answer_en:
Tensor Veli Palatini m.
Tenses the soft palate
Opens the pharyngotympanic tube (Eustachian tube; auditory tube)

details: Opens the pharyngotympanic tube (Eustachian tube; auditory tube)

title: Sagittal Section of Pharynx (Right Side)
subtitle: (Tongue and Nasal Conchae Removed)
